en: After this Jesus went away to the other side of the Sea of Galilee, which is the Sea of Tiberias.
zh: 這些事以後，耶穌渡過加利利海，就是提比里亞海。

en: And a large crowd was following him, because they saw the signs that he was doing on the sick.
zh: 有一大群人，因為看見了他在病人身上所行的神蹟，就跟隨了他。

en: Jesus went up on the mountain, and there he sat down with his disciples.
zh: 耶穌上了山，同門徒坐在那裡。

en: Now the Passover, the feast of the Jews, was at hand.
zh: 那時猶太人的逾越節近了。

en: Lifting up his eyes, then, and seeing that a large crowd was coming toward him, Jesus said to Philip, "Where are we to buy bread, so that these people may eat?"
zh: 耶穌舉目觀看，見一大群人向他走過來，就對腓力說：“我們從哪裡買餅給這些人吃呢？”

en: He said this to test him, for he himself knew what he would do.
zh: 他說這話，是要試驗腓力，因他自己早已知道要怎樣作。

en: Philip answered him, "Two hundred denarii would not buy enough bread for each of them to get a little."
zh: 腓力回答：“就算二百銀幣買的餅，每人分一點，也是不夠的。”

en: One of his disciples, Andrew, Simon Peter's brother, said to him,
zh: 有一個門徒，就是西門．彼得的弟弟安得烈，對耶穌說：

en: "There is a boy here who has five barley loaves and two fish, but what are they for so many?"
zh: “這裡有個小孩子，帶著五個大麥餅、兩條魚；只是分給這麼多人，有甚麼用呢？”

en: Jesus said, "Have the people sit down." Now there was much grass in the place. So the men sat down, about five thousand in number.
zh: 耶穌吩咐他們：“你們叫眾人坐下。”原來那地方的草很多，眾人就坐下，單是男人的數目約有五千。

en: Jesus then took the loaves, and when he had given thanks, he distributed them to those who were seated. So also the fish, as much as they wanted.
zh: 耶穌拿起餅來，祝謝了，就分給坐著的人；分魚也是這樣，都是隨著他們所要的。

en: And when they had eaten their fill, he told his disciples, "Gather up the leftover fragments, that nothing may be lost."
zh: 他們吃飽了之後，耶穌對門徒說：“把剩下的零碎收拾起來，免得浪費。”

en: So they gathered them up and filled twelve baskets with fragments from the five barley loaves, left by those who had eaten.
zh: 門徒就把眾人吃剩那五個大麥餅的零碎收拾起來，裝滿了十二個籃子。

en: When the people saw the sign that he had done, they said, "This is indeed the Prophet who is to come into the world!"
zh: 眾人看見耶穌所行的神蹟，就說：“這真是那要到世上來的先知。”

en: Perceiving then that they were about to come and take him by force to make him king, Jesus withdrew again to the mountain by himself.
zh: 耶穌知道群眾要來強迫他作王，就獨自又退到山上去了。

en: When evening came, his disciples went down to the sea,
zh: 到了晚上，他的門徒下到海邊去。

en: got into a boat, and started across the sea to Capernaum. It was now dark, and Jesus had not yet come to them.
zh: 他們上了船，要渡海往迦百農去。那時天已經黑了，耶穌還沒有到他們那裡。

en: The sea became rough because a strong wind was blowing.
zh: 忽然海上起了狂風，波浪翻騰。

en: When they had rowed about three or four miles, they saw Jesus walking on the sea and coming near the boat, and they were frightened.
zh: 門徒搖櫓約行了五六公里，看見耶穌在海面上行走，漸漸靠近船，就害怕起來。

en: But he said to them, "It is I; do not be afraid."
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“是我，不要怕。”

en: Then they were glad to take him into the boat, and immediately the boat was at the land to which they were going.
zh: 他們這才把他接上船，船就立刻到了他們要去的地方。

en: On the next day the crowd that remained on the other side of the sea saw that there had been only one boat there, and that Jesus had not entered the boat with his disciples, but that his disciples had gone away alone.
zh: 第二天，站在海那邊的群眾，看見只有一隻小船留在那裡，並且知道耶穌沒有和他的門徒一同上船，門徒是自己去的；

en: Other boats from Tiberias came near the place where they had eaten the bread after the Lord had given thanks.
zh: 不過有幾隻從提比里亞來的船停在那裡，靠近他們在主祝謝以後吃餅的地方。

en: So when the crowd saw that Jesus was not there, nor his disciples, they themselves got into the boats and went to Capernaum, seeking Jesus.
zh: 群眾見耶穌和門徒都不在那裡，就上船往迦百農去找耶穌。

en: When they found him on the other side of the sea, they said to him, "Rabbi, when did you come here?"
zh: 他們在對岸找到了耶穌，就問他：“拉比，你幾時到這裡來的？”

en: Jesus answered them, "Truly, truly, I say to you, you are seeking me, not because you saw signs, but because you ate your fill of the loaves.
zh: 耶穌回答：“我實實在在告訴你們，你們找我，不是因為看見了神蹟，而是因為吃了餅又吃飽了。

en: Do not labor for the food that perishes, but for the food that endures to eternal life, which the Son of Man will give to you. For on him God the Father has set his seal."
zh: 不要為那必朽壞的食物操勞，卻要為那存到永生的食物操勞，就是人子所要賜給你們的，因為人子是父 神所印證的。”

en: Then they said to him, "What must we do, to be doing the works of God?"
zh: 眾人又問他：“我們應該作甚麼，才算是作 神的工作呢？”

en: Jesus answered them, "This is the work of God, that you believe in him whom he has sent."
zh: 耶穌回答：“信 神所差來的，就是作 神的工了。”

en: So they said to him, "Then what sign do you do, that we may see and believe you? What work do you perform?
zh: 於是他們就說：“你要行甚麼神蹟，讓我們看了就信你呢？你到底能作甚麼呢？

en: Our fathers ate the manna in the wilderness; as it is written, 'He gave them bread from heaven to eat.'"
zh: 我們的祖宗在曠野吃過嗎哪，正如經上所記：‘他把從天上來的食物賜給他們吃。’”

en: Jesus then said to them, "Truly, truly, I say to you, it was not Moses who gave you the bread from heaven, but my Father gives you the true bread from heaven.
zh: 耶穌對他們說：“我實實在在告訴你們，不是摩西把那從天上來的食物賜給你們，而是我父把天上來的真食物賜給你們；

en: For the bread of God is he who comes down from heaven and gives life to the world."
zh: 因為 神的食物就是從天上降下來，把生命賜給世人的那一位。”

en: They said to him, "Sir, give us this bread always."
zh: 他們對耶穌說：“主啊，求你常把這食物賜給我們。”

en: Jesus said to them, "I am the bread of life; whoever comes to me shall not hunger, and whoever believes in me shall never thirst.
zh: 耶穌說：“我就是生命的食物，到我這裡來的，必定不餓；信我的，永遠不渴。

en: But I said to you that you have seen me and yet do not believe.
zh: 但我告訴你們，你們雖然見了我，還是不信。

en: All that the Father gives me will come to me, and whoever comes to me I will never cast out.
zh: 凡是父賜給我的人，必到我這裡來；到我這裡來的，我決不丟棄他，

en: For I have come down from heaven, not to do my own will but the will of him who sent me.
zh: 因為我從天上降下來，不是要行自己的意思，而是要行那差我來者的旨意。

en: And this is the will of him who sent me, that I should lose nothing of all that he has given me, but raise it up on the last day.
zh: 那差我來者的旨意就是：他所賜給我的人，我連一個也不失落，並且在末日我要使他們復活。

en: For this is the will of my Father, that everyone who looks on the Son and believes in him should have eternal life, and I will raise him up on the last day."
zh: 因為我父的旨意，是要使所有看見了子而信的人有永生，並且在末日我要使他們復活。”

en: So the Jews grumbled about him, because he said, "I am the bread that came down from heaven."
zh: 猶太人因為耶穌說“我是從天上降下來的食物”，就紛紛議論他。

en: They said, "Is not this Jesus, the son of Joseph, whose father and mother we know? How does he now say, 'I have come down from heaven'?"
zh: 他們說：“這不是約瑟的兒子耶穌嗎？他的父母我們不都認識嗎？他現在怎麼說‘我是從天上降下來的’呢？”

en: Jesus answered them, "Do not grumble among yourselves.
zh: 耶穌回答：“你們不要彼此議論。

en: No one can come to me unless the Father who sent me draws him. And I will raise him up on the last day.
zh: 如果不是差我來的父吸引人，就沒有人能到我這裡來；到我這裡來的，在末日我要使他復活。

en: It is written in the Prophets, 'And they will all be taught by God.' Everyone who has heard and learned from the Father comes to me-
zh: 先知書上記著：‘眾人都必受 神的教導。’凡聽見從父那裡來的教訓而又學習的，必到我這裡來。

en: not that anyone has seen the Father except him who is from God; he has seen the Father.
zh: 這不是說有人見過父；只有從 神那裡來的那一位，他才見過父。

en: Truly, truly, I say to you, whoever believes has eternal life.
zh: 我實實在在告訴你們，信的人有永生。

en: I am the bread of life.
zh: 我就是生命的食物，

en: Your fathers ate the manna in the wilderness, and they died.
zh: 你們的祖宗在曠野吃過嗎哪，還是死了。

en: This is the bread that comes down from heaven, so that one may eat of it and not die.
zh: 這是從天上降下來的食物，使人吃了就不死。

en: I am the living bread that came down from heaven. If anyone eats of this bread, he will live forever. And the bread that I will give for the life of the world is my flesh."
zh: 我就是從天上降下來生命的食物，人若吃了這食物，就必活到永遠。我要賜的食物就是我的肉，是為了世人的生命而賜的。”

en: The Jews then disputed among themselves, saying, "How can this man give us his flesh to eat?"
zh: 於是，猶太人彼此爭論，說：“這個人怎能把他的肉給我們吃呢？”

en: So Jesus said to them, "Truly, truly, I say to you, unless you eat the flesh of the Son of Man and drink his blood, you have no life in you.
zh: 耶穌就對他們說：“我實實在在告訴你們，你們若不吃人子的肉，不喝人子的血，就沒有生命在你們裡面。

en: Whoever feeds on my flesh and drinks my blood has eternal life, and I will raise him up on the last day.
zh: 吃我肉、喝我血的，就有永生，在末日我要使他復活；

en: For my flesh is true food, and my blood is true drink.
zh: 因為我的肉是真正的食物，我的血是真正的飲料。

en: Whoever feeds on my flesh and drinks my blood abides in me, and I in him.
zh: 吃我肉、喝我血的人，就住在我裡面，我也住在他裡面。

en: As the living Father sent me, and I live because of the Father, so whoever feeds on me, he also will live because of me.
zh: 正如永活的父差遣了我，我也因父活著；照樣，吃我肉的人也必因我而活。

en: This is the bread that came down from heaven, not as the fathers ate and died. Whoever feeds on this bread will live forever."
zh: 這就是從天上降下來的食物，不像嗎哪，你們的祖宗吃過，還是死了；吃這食物的，必活到永遠。”

en: Jesus said these things in the synagogue, as he taught at Capernaum.
zh: 這些話是耶穌在迦百農會堂裡教導人的時候說的。

en: When many of his disciples heard it, they said, "This is a hard saying; who can listen to it?"
zh: 他的門徒中，有許多人聽了，就說：“這話很難，誰能接受呢？”

en: But Jesus, knowing in himself that his disciples were grumbling about this, said to them, "Do you take offense at this?
zh: 耶穌心裡知道門徒為了這事議論紛紛，就對他們說：“這話使你們動搖嗎？

en: Then what if you were to see the Son of Man ascending to where he was before?
zh: 如果你們看見人子升到他原來所在的地方，又怎樣呢？

en: It is the Spirit who gives life; the flesh is of no avail. The words that I have spoken to you are spirit and life.
zh: 使人活的是靈，肉體是無濟於事的。我對你們所說的話是靈、是生命。

en: But there are some of you who do not believe." (For Jesus knew from the beginning who those were who did not believe, and who it was who would betray him.)
zh: 然而你們中間卻有不信的人。”原來從起初耶穌就知道那些不信的是誰，那要把他出賣的又是誰。

en: And he said, "This is why I told you that no one can come to me unless it is granted him by the Father."
zh: 耶穌跟著說：“所以我對你們說過，如果不是父所賜的，沒有人能到我這裡來。”

en: After this many of his disciples turned back and no longer walked with him.
zh: 從此，他的門徒中有許多人退去了，不再與他同行。

en: So Jesus said to the Twelve, "Do you want to go away as well?"
zh: 於是耶穌對十二門徒說：“你們也想離去嗎？”

en: Simon Peter answered him, "Lord, to whom shall we go? You have the words of eternal life,
zh: 西門．彼得回答：“主啊，你有永生之道，我們還跟從誰呢？

en: and we have believed, and have come to know, that you are the Holy One of God."
zh: 我們已經相信，並且知道你是 神的聖者。”

en: Jesus answered them, "Did I not choose you, the Twelve? And yet one of you is a devil."
zh: 耶穌說：“我不是揀選了你們十二個人嗎？但你們中間有一個是魔鬼。”

en: He spoke of Judas the son of Simon Iscariot, for he, one of the Twelve, was going to betray him.
zh: 耶穌這話是指著加略人西門的兒子猶大說的，因為他雖然是十二門徒之一，卻要出賣耶穌。
